prompt: Create a lavish vertical anime character collector poster in a premium magazine-cover and merchandise-catalog style, centered on Yae Miko, a beautiful adult shrine maiden with very long flowing pink hair, violet eyes, and a confident flirtatious expression, seated elegantly on a dark lacquered shrine chest with gold tassels and floral ornamentation. She wears an elaborate sheer sakura-themed ceremonial outfit in layered translucent pink and white fabric, with floral embroidery, ribbons, jeweled accessories, gold details, detached sleeves, a delicate veil, ornate earrings, and strappy high heels, showing a glamorous fashion-illustration silhouette with one leg crossed and one hand near her lips. Surround the whole composition with cherry blossoms, petals, decorative borders, gold filigree, and soft pastel pink lighting. The page should look like a special edition fan collectible poster with many integrated design elements and readable labels. At the top, place giant decorative serif typography reading “YAE MIKO” across the background, plus a small upper-left label “Generalpost • ETERNAL SAKURA” and an upper-right plaque reading “Lady Guuji OF THE GRAND NARUKAMI SHRINE”. On the right side near the character, add one vertical Japanese text line. Include a left-side stamp sheet titled “CHIBI STAMP COLLECTION” containing exactly 6 stamp-style chibi portraits arranged in a 2x3 grid, all of the same character in different cute expressions or poses. Below that, include a section titled “Mini Figure Collection” with exactly 3 small chibi figure variants standing side by side. Below that, include a “Stickers” section with exactly 5 die-cut stickers: 4 chibi character stickers and 1 fox mask sticker. On the right lower side, add a hanging “Character Profile” card with the labels “Birthday”, “Affiliation”, “Vision”, and “Constellation”, plus a short quote line at the bottom. At the bottom edge, include exactly 4 ticket or stamp-like bonus items: 1 round emblem with a fox symbol, 1 commemorative sakura festival ticket, 1 Narukami Shrine special pass, and 1 postage-style stamp marked with the date 27 APR 2024 and a fox motif. Add a limited-edition serial tag on the lower left reading “NO. 08888 / 10000”. Place a detailed white fox mask with red markings and floral decoration in the lower-right foreground. Overall style: ultra-detailed anime illustration, polished gacha-merchandise advertisement design, elegant sakura fantasy aesthetic, pink and rose-gold palette, layered print textures, crisp line art, luxurious shading, high detail, collectible premium poster composition.
